meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't deploy apps (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't deploy apps. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Template: Fix Deployment Issues Fast for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with deployment blockers. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to streamline your workflow and ship client apps faster.
content.answer_block: Deployment failure usually stems from configuration drift and environment mismatch. The Antigravity project template standardizes your stack, while Claude Code automates the infrastructure-as-code layer. By unifying your deployment pipeline into a single, repeatable artifact, you eliminate manual error, ensuring your client projects launch on the first attempt every time.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking. Your client is waiting, the demo is scheduled, and your terminal is screaming a wall of red error text about environment variables and failed builds. You are trapped in the 'it works on my machine' purgatory, watching your billable hours evaporate into a void of debugging dependency hell.

But the best engineers don't fight deployment battles; they engineer them out of existence. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you move from manual configuration to a hardened, automated deployment architecture. This isn't just about fixing a bug—it’s about building a repeatable, professional-grade pipeline that turns deployment from a nightmare into a non-event.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish a clean, production-ready foundation that enforces strict environment separation and dependency management.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project scaffold using the Antigravity standard template. Ensure all deployment environment variables are abstracted into a secure configuration module.

steps.title: Configure Infrastructure-as-Code
steps.description: Define your cloud resources programmatically to ensure the production environment is identical to your local development setup.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate the necessary IaC files for a standard cloud deployment. Map all local environment variables to the production secrets manager.

steps.title: Automate Dependency Validation
steps.description: Prevent runtime errors by automating the verification of production-grade dependencies within the Antigravity container.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a pre-deployment script that validates all production dependencies against the Antigravity lockfile, alerting on version mismatches.

steps.title: Integrate CI/CD Pipeline
steps.description: Hook your Antigravity project into an automated deployment loop that runs tests before every single push.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow for the Antigravity template that executes a dry-run deployment and linting check on every commit.

steps.title: Execute Production Deployment
steps.description: Perform a verified deployment using the hardened template, ensuring zero downtime and rollback safety.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a diagnostic check of the current configuration and trigger the deployment sequence using the Antigravity CLI.

pro_tips: Always use .env.example files as a template to prevent sensitive key leakage in your Git history.
Configure your Antigravity build to output minified artifacts; it reduces cold-start times by up to 40%.
Use Claude Code to write custom 'health check' endpoints that verify database connectivity before the app fully initializes.
Tag every deployment version in Git to ensure you can roll back to a known-stable state in under 30 seconds.
Automate your logs to pipe directly into a structured logging service to avoid hunting for errors in raw server files.
content.next_steps: Once your deployment is live, implement a monitoring dashboard to track error rates and proactively address performance bottlenecks before your client notices.
content.conversion_block: Stop wasting billable hours on broken deployments and start shipping with the confidence of a lead architect. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
